  "findings": [
    "No confined space attendant posted during active entry operations",
    "Severe life-safety hazard and non-compliance with permit-required confined space standards"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Immediately order all entrants to evacuate the confined space",
    "Suspend the permit-required confined space entry permit",
    "Do not allow re-entry until a qualified attendant is posted and all safety protocols are verified"
  ],
  "rationale": "Under OSHA 1910.146, a permit-required confined space entry must have a designated, trained attendant stationed outside the permit space at all times during entry operations. The absence of an attendant is a critical safety failure that immediately endangers the lives of the entrants.",
  "references": [
    "OSHA 1910.146(d)(6)",
    "OSHA 1910.146(i)"
  ]
}
